tasks_completed.changes: Added .last-cleanup, playwright-storage-state.json, .todos.json, docs/ under new 'Dev cycle output and session state' comment block
tasks_completed.rationale: Root cause: files were tracked before .gitignore exclusion rules existed. Adding entries prevents re-introduction after untracking.

tasks_completed.description: Untracked three individual sentinel files via git rm --cached
tasks_completed.changes: git rm --cached .last-cleanup playwright-storage-state.json .todos.json — all three removed from index, files preserved on disk
tasks_completed.rationale: Files were in git index but are transient/session-local and should never have been tracked.

tasks_completed.description: Untracked all 383 docs/ files recursively via git rm -r --cached docs/
tasks_completed.changes: 383 files removed from git index under docs/ (docs/dev/, docs/reference/, docs/archive/, docs/test/, docs/guides/, etc.). Files preserved on disk.
tasks_completed.rationale: User Q1 decision: ignore ALL of docs/ entirely. docs/ is dev-cycle output (BA specs, QA reports, context JSONs) — not for version control.

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: N/A — multiple historical commits; files landed in index before exclusion rules were added
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: Repos grew organically; .gitignore rules were added after initial commits, leaving previously-tracked files stuck in the index. git rm --cached was not run when rules were added.
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Four new .gitignore patterns prevent future tracking; git rm --cached removes all current index entries for these paths without touching disk files.

self_verification.build: skipped (git hygiene task — no build artifact)
self_verification.notes: Verified: git ls-files .last-cleanup playwright-storage-state.json .todos.json returns empty. git ls-files docs/ returns 0. All three individual files and docs/ dir confirmed still on disk. .gitignore diff shows +6 lines (4 entries + comment + blank line). No unintended files removed — remaining tracked count is 1039.

dev.qa_notes: Verify: (1) git ls-files .last-cleanup playwright-storage-state.json .todos.json returns empty; (2) git ls-files docs/ | wc -l returns 0; (3) ls .last-cleanup .todos.json playwright-storage-state.json docs/ all still exist on disk; (4) git check-ignore .last-cleanup playwright-storage-state.json .todos.json docs/dev/ all exit 0.

recommendations: No commit made per task instructions — orchestrator should commit with appropriate message when all repos are clean.
Consider adding docs/ to .gitignore earlier in future repo setups to avoid re-accumulation.
